name: Advanced Crystal Beast Amber Mammoth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アドバンスド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> アンバー・マンモス
desc: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets your "Advanced Crystal Beast" card(s) or "Advanced Dark" (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation. Once per turn, when your "Advanced Crystal Beast" monster is targeted for an attack: You can negate that attack. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
mnst_eff: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that targets your "Advanced Crystal Beast" card(s) or "Advanced Dark" (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation. Once per turn, when your "Advanced Crystal Beast" monster is targeted for an attack: You can negate that attack. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
eff: If "Advanced Dark" is not in a Field Zone, send this monster to the GY. action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Activates if targeted by card effect
Activates if targeted for an attack
Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
